title: ExampleVerdict
description: Minimal example schema for an LLM-generated multi-axis verdict. Adapt fields to your domain — the critic skill cares about the pattern (schema + rubric), not these specific fields.

primary_axis_copy.description: One-to-three sentences in the app's intended persona judging the primary axis.

secondary_axis_copy.description: One-to-three sentences judging the secondary axis.

overall_verdict.description: NEUTRAL_* variants apply when the safety gate trips and the primary axis is neither praised nor critiqued.

headline.description: Short one-liner that anchors the verdict card.

persona_signature.description: Footer credit referencing the user's persona name.
